message:
fix(agent-health): prevent stack overflow from large output chunks

pushOutputSample() used spread operator to push new lines, which
could cause stack overflow when output chunk contains many lines
(spread creates many function arguments).

Changes:
- Pre-slice newLines if larger than MAX_OUTPUT_LINES before combining
- Use concat() instead of spread for array combination
- Maintains same tail-retention behavior with bounded memory

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
